ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content item */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Slug or URL-friendly title */,
  "content_type" INTEGER /* Type of content (e.g., page, post) */,
  "live" INTEGER /* Whether the content is live or not */,
  "has_unpublished_changes" INTEGER /* Whether the content has unpublished changes */,
  "url_path" TEXT /* URL path of the content */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the content was last updated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the content */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the content */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date and time the content was published */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date and time the content will expire */,
  "meta_title" TEXT /* Meta title of the content */,
  "meta_description" TEXT /* Meta description of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item being revised */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the revision was made */,
  "content_json" TEXT /* JSON object containing the revised content */,
  "revision_type" TEXT /* Type of revision */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "locale" TEXT /* User's preferred language or locale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item being translated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the translation */,
  "title" TEXT /* Translated title of the content */,
  "content_json" TEXT /* JSON object containing the translated content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_translations_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item being categorized */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_categories_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_index" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search index */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item being indexed */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword or search term */,
  "relevance" INTEGER /* Relevance score of the content item for the search term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_index_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)
